name: Digital Studio LF
description: Web design and development studio based in Marrakesh, Morocco. Builds custom websites, landing pages, admin dashboards, and CRM systems for businesses worldwide. Delivery in 7–21 days.

tools.name: contact_inquiry
tools.description: Submit a project inquiry to Digital Studio LF. Use this to request a quote, ask about services, or start a project conversation. The team replies within 24 hours.

name.description: Full name of the person making the inquiry.

projectType.description: Type of project the client needs.

budget.description: Approximate budget range for the project.

message.description: Description of the project, goals, timeline, and any other relevant details.

success.description: Whether the inquiry was submitted successfully.

resources.name: services
resources.description: Full list of web design and development services offered.

resources.name: pricing
resources.description: Fixed-price packages: Starter, Professional, and Enterprise.

resources.name: portfolio
resources.description: Examples of websites, dashboards, and CRM systems delivered to clients.

resources.name: news
resources.description: Blog articles on web design, CRM development, and digital business.
